title: query_research data payload
description: Structured payload returned by the `query_research` tool. BM25 retrieval over the cuneiform-research markdown vault. Wrapped in the StructuredEnvelope from envelope.schema.json. Source: local Research/ markdown vault, indexed at process startup.

query.description: The raw question text the caller passed.

cluster_filter.description: Optional cluster constraint applied (one of: cosmology, theology, royal_myth, divination_science, reception_comparative, monuments, infrastructure, uncategorized).

brief_filter.description: Optional substring filter against brief names.

section_path.description: Heading of the section this chunk came from.

score.description: BM25 relevance score; higher = more relevant.

scholar_citations.description: Named-Assyriologist citations extracted from this chunk (e.g. 'Lambert 2013', 'George 2003').

synthesis_flag.description: True if this chunk contains [my synthesis] or [unverified] markers.
